subcodes.first_line: O youth! God willing, through the bounty of the All-Merciful, thou hast attained the limitless outpourings of these divine days
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان انشاء الله از عنایت رحمن بفیوضات نامتناهیه ایام الهیه فائز باشی و از
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
